name: sysGetVariableMax
title: sysGetVariableMax
syntax: long sysGetVariableMax(char namespace[], char variable[], long& maxValue); // form 3
long sysGetVariableMax(char namespace[], char variable[], double& maxValue); // form 4
long sysGetVariableMax(char namespace[], char variable[], dword& maxValue); // form 6
long sysGetVariableMax(char namespace[], char variable[], int64& maxValue); // form 8
long sysGetVariableMax(char namespace[], char variable[], qword& maxValue); // form 10
description: Retrieves the maximum of a variable.

parameters.name: SysVarName
parameters.description: Name of the fully qualified name of the system variable, including all name spaces, separated by "::".The name must be preceded by "sysVar::".

parameters.name: maxValue
parameters.description: Receives the maximum of the variable if no errors occur (reference parameter). Must be the correct type for the system variable.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
